# polymarket_activity (Data Source)

Lists a wallet's unified on-chain activity feed — trades, rewards, splits, merges, redemptions, and conversions — most recent first.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# A wallet's unified on-chain activity: trades, rewards, splits, merges,
# redemptions, and conversions.
data "polymarket_activity" "recent" {
  user  = "0x349606c1b77f3ba668879cbc9347f15a44cf8fc4"
  limit = 20
}

# Just the reward entries, for example.
output "rewards" {
  value = [for a in data.polymarket_activity.recent.activity : a if a.type == "REWARD"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `user` (String) Wallet address whose activity to list (`0x`-prefixed). The only required input.

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of entries to return. Combine with `offset` to paginate.
- `market` (String) When set, restricts results to activity in the market with this condition ID.
- `offset` (Number) Number of entries to skip before collecting results, for pagination.
- `type` (String) When set, returns only entries of this type, e.g. `TRADE`, `REWARD`, `SPLIT`, `MERGE`, `REDEEM`, or `CONVERSION`.

### Read-Only

- `activity` (Attributes List) Activity entries for the wallet. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--activity))

<a id="nestedatt--activity"></a>
### Nested Schema for `activity`

Read-Only:

- `asset` (String) CLOB token ID of the outcome involved.
- `condition_id` (String) Condition ID of the market involved.
- `event_slug` (String) Slug of the parent event.
- `outcome` (String) Name of the outcome involved.
- `outcome_index` (Number) Zero-based index of the outcome within the market.
- `price` (Number) For trades, the execution price, in `[0, 1]`.
- `side` (String) For trades, the direction (`BUY` or `SELL`); empty for non-trade activity.
- `size` (Number) Number of shares involved.
- `slug` (String) Slug of the market involved.
- `timestamp` (Number) Time of the activity, in Unix seconds.
- `title` (String) Title of the market involved.
- `transaction_hash` (String) On-chain transaction hash for the activity.
- `type` (String) Entry type: `TRADE`, `REWARD`, `SPLIT`, `MERGE`, `REDEEM`, or `CONVERSION`.
- `usdc_size` (Number) USDC value of the activity.
